query:
UPDATE orders 
SET deliveryDuration = TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, createdAt, deliveredAt)
WHERE status = 'delivered' 
  AND deliveryDuration IS NULL 
  AND acceptedAt IS NULL 
  AND deliveredAt IS NOT NULL 
  AND createdAt IS NOT NULL;
